title: Wenko 17452100 Toilet seat Bergamo Beige rustproof Stainless Steel mounting, Plastic Duroplast, 37.2 x 44.4 cm, Beige
features: • Made of high quality duroplast, in beige
• Size (W x D): Cover - 35 x 44,4 cm / Outer ring - 37.2 x 44 cm / Inner ring - 23 x 29 cm / Attachment distance - 13 x 17.5 cm
description: Product Description A classic in the bathroom - the beige toilet seat Bergamo with its recessed lid has almost straight features on both outer edges. The toilet seat, made of high-quality Duroplast offers pleasant seating comfort and stability. It is also perfectly suitable for use on highly frequented toilets such as in shops, surgeries or offices, as it is highly scratch-resistant, unbreakable, durable and also resistant to cigarette burns. The hygienic surface is also easy to clean. The rustproof stainless steel mounting is also flexibly adjustable to fit conventional toilets. Box Contains Toilet seat
